primary_goal: Turn vehicle-level data into executive intelligence and operational control.

phases.name: Roadmap Planning
phases.summary: Official v1.1 roadmap, planning service, roadmap page, and validation foundation.

phases.name: Vehicle Intelligence Foundation
phases.summary: Create vehicle intelligence service that aggregates vehicle data from existing modules.

phases.name: Vehicle Health Score
phases.summary: Calculate vehicle health based on compliance, maintenance, tire status, alerts, and audit signals.

phases.name: Vehicle Operational Timeline
phases.summary: Create unified vehicle timeline across compliance, maintenance, tire, audit, and financial events.

phases.name: Vehicle Profit/Risk Fusion
phases.summary: Combine cost, maintenance, tire, compliance risk, and profitability into vehicle-level operational score.

phases.name: Executive Vehicle Intelligence Dashboard
phases.summary: Executive view for best/worst vehicles, high-risk, high-cost, incomplete data, and action priorities.

phases.name: v1.1 Stabilization
phases.summary: v1.1 QA sprint for consistency, navigation, regression, and release readiness.

phases.name: v1.1 Release Candidate
phases.summary: v1.1 RC preparation with inventory, known issues, and release validation.
